training_status: sedentary (works remote, does light curls during work day)

benefits.description: Extreme appetite suppression; feels full constantly, likens it to feeling like every day is Thanksgiving; only able to consume ~500 calories/day
Wife reports OP is full of energy for about 5 days after each shot

side_effects.description: Ate a small burger and felt like vomiting; strong food aversion
Severe appetite suppression leading to only ~500 cal/day intake; has to force himself to eat

protocol_notes: 6' tall male, starting weight 325 lbs, BMI ~44%. Using 30mg bottle reconstituted with 30ml BAC water. First injection Jan 13, 2024. Also on TRT. Eating primarily tuna, salad, and protein powder (~500 cal/day). Works remotely, does light arm curls during work day. Questioning whether to increase to 5mg or dose every 3 days. Was told heavy people should dose every 5 days.
